block_1.name: Custom Title
block_1.title: Creating the future of medicine in the Bay Area

item_0.name: Text Container Text
item_0.text: At AbbVie, we are combining our historic legacy in biopharma with the spirit of California innovation. Our team in South San Francisco is pushing the limits of science and technology and driving the discovery and delivery of innovative treatments for cancer.

block.description: At our South San Francisco facility, we are pursuing transformative R&D and commercialization. Join our virtual tour experience to see the site up close.
block.name: Teaser
block.title: Built for collaboration and innovation

block_1.caption: AbbVie’s campus is minutes away from hundreds of life sciences companies in South San Francisco, offering unlimited opportunities for scientific collaboration
block_1.name: Custom Image

block_2.caption: A warm welcome for visitors and more than 1,000 Bay Area employees
block_2.name: Custom Image

block_3.caption: Spaces built for teamwork and collaboration
block_3.name: Custom Image

block_4.caption: Our labs in the Bay Area are an integral part of our global R&D ecosystem, which includes centers in Illinois, Massachusetts, Germany, and Japan
block_4.name: Custom Image

block_5.caption: A pedestrian-friendly Gateway Central Park offers space to hold outdoor meetings, grab coffee, and enjoy fresh air
block_5.name: Custom Image

block_6.caption: Fitness facilities, group classes, and dining areas available for employees
block_6.name: Custom Image

block_7.caption: Space for collaboration with colleagues while having coffee or a meal
block_7.name: Custom Image

block.name: Custom Title
block.title: Committed to transforming standards of care

item_0.name: Text Container Text
item_0.text: by advancing cancer research and the development of new treatments for a range of blood and other forms of cancer

item_0.name: Text Container Text
item_0.text: with 480,000 square feet of R&D labs and offices

item_0.name: Text Container Text
item_0.text: including the 50,000 square feet Traverse amenity building next door, offering a communal food hall, fitness club, and gathering space

item_0.name: Text Container Text
item_0.text: We discover and develop innovative medicines that help solve serious health issues for people around the world. In South San Francisco, we are driving AbbVie’s leadership in oncology and immunology, and using precision medicine to unlock more targeted treatments for patients.

item_0_910536540.name: Text Container Text
item_0_910536540.text: Beyond South San Francisco, we have a presence throughout the Bay Area, which includes sites that became part of AbbVie through our acquisition of Allergan in 2020.

item_0.name: Text Container Text
item_0.text: Dynamic scientific minds with strong values are essential to delivering on the promise of our R&D efforts. We are a passionate, diverse, equitable, and inclusive organization with a culture that supports bold ideas.

item_0_491477286.name: Text Container Text
item_0_491477286.text: With global opportunities in more than 175 countries and 60 disease areas, AbbVie provides challenging work that aims to deliver life-changing impact for patients.

block_7.linkText: Grow your career at AbbVie in the Bay Area
block_7.name: Cta

item_0.name: Text Container Text
item_0.text:
Our work spans from early research and discovery to delivery of our medicines with focus areas in:

  • Immuno-Oncology
  • Tumor Targeting
  • Tumor Dependencies
  • Precision Medicine
